resources.string: execute arbitrary commands within &TERMUX_APP_NAME; environment and access files
&TERMUX_APP_NAME; was unable to install the bootstrap packages.
&TERMUX_APP_NAME; can only be run as the primary user. \nBootstrap binaries compiled for &TERMUX_APP_NAME; have hardcoded $PREFIX path and cannot be installed under any path other than:\n%1$s.

&TERMUX_APP_NAME; cannot be installed on portable/external/removable sd card on your device. \nBootstrap binaries compiled for &TERMUX_APP_NAME; have hardcoded $PREFIX path and cannot be installed under any path other than:\n%1$s.
Close down existing ones before creating new.

Hermes CLI is not installed.

Place the hermes binary at:
%1$s
and make it executable:
chmod +x %1$s
Click URL to copy or long press to open
No URL found in the terminal.
Add termux debug info to report?
The &TERMUX_STYLING_APP_NAME; Plugin App is not installed.
&TERMUX_APP_NAME; requires \"Display over other apps\" permission to start terminal sessions from background on Android >= 10. Grants it from Settings -> Apps -> &TERMUX_APP_NAME; -> Advanced
Invalid execution command runner to TermuxService: `%1$s`
Unsupported execution command runner to TermuxService: `%1$s`
Unsupported execution command shell create mode to TermuxService: `%1$s`
Shell name not set but `%1$s` shell create mode passed
Invalid execution command runner to RunCommandService: `%1$s`
Visit %1$s for more info on RUN_COMMAND Intent usage.
Failed to start TermuxService. Check logcat for exception message.
Failed to start TermuxService while app is in background due to android bg restrictions.
Logs will not have entries for terminal view keys. (Default)
Logcat logs will have entries for terminal view keys. These are very verbose and should be disabled under normal circumstances or will cause performance issues.
Disable flashes and notifications for plugin errors.
Show flashes and notifications for plugin errors. (Default)
Soft Keyboard Only If No Hardware
Soft keyboard will be enabled even if hardware keyboard is connected. (Default)
Soft keyboard will be enabled only if no hardware keyboard is connected.
Terminal margin adjustment will be disabled.

Terminal margin adjustment will be enabled. It should be enabled to try to fix the issue where soft keyboard covers part of extra keys/terminal view. If it causes screen flickering on your devices, then disable it. (Default)
Set AI provider, API key, and model
Start, stop, or restart the Hermes gateway
Reset all Hermes settings to defaults
This will delete your Hermes configuration files. API keys and settings will be lost.
Save settings to a file for backup
Restore settings from a backup file
This will overwrite your current settings. Continue?
Check if a newer version of Hermes Agent is available
Hermes Agent is up to date (%1$s)
Model name to use (e.g. gpt-4o, claude-sonnet-4-6)
Flagship model. Best for complex reasoning, analysis, and creative tasks. Fast responses, excellent all-rounder.
Fast and affordable. Great for simple tasks, quick answers, and high-volume usage.
Advanced reasoning model. Thinks step-by-step for math, science, and complex problem-solving. Slower but more thorough.
Faster reasoning model. Good balance of reasoning ability and speed.
Latest reasoning model. Improved efficiency and capability for complex tasks.
Previous generation flagship. Still powerful but newer models are recommended.
Best balance of speed and intelligence. Recommended for most tasks — writing, analysis, coding, and conversation.
Most capable model. Excels at complex analysis, nuanced writing, and challenging problems. Higher cost, slower responses.
Fastest Claude model. Great for quick tasks, classification, and when speed matters most. Most affordable.
Most capable Gemini model. Strong at reasoning, multilingual tasks, and long context. Good for complex work.
Fast and efficient. Excellent for everyday tasks with good quality. Great value.
Previous generation flash model. Fast responses at lower cost.
General purpose model. Strong at coding and math. Very cost-effective.
Reasoning model that shows its thought process. Best for complex logic and math problems.
Access multiple providers through one API. Choose any model — costs vary by provider.
Latest Grok model with real-time knowledge. Good for current events and general tasks.
Smaller, faster Grok model. Good for quick tasks at lower cost.
Most capable Qwen model. Excellent Chinese language support and general reasoning.
Balanced performance and cost. Good for most tasks with strong Chinese support.
Fastest Qwen model. Ideal for simple tasks and high-volume usage. Most affordable.
Most capable Mistral model. Strong at following complex instructions and multilingual tasks.
Balanced model. Good performance at moderate cost.
Specialized for code generation and understanding. Best for programming tasks.
Meta\'s open-source model. Great general purpose capabilities running on NVIDIA infrastructure.
Reasoning model with transparent thought process. Excels at math and logic problems.
Google\'s open model. Efficient and capable for its size.
NVIDIA\'s fine-tuned model. Optimized for helpfulness and instruction following.
Meta\'s popular open-source model. Runs locally, completely private. Good general purpose.
Strong multilingual model. Excellent Chinese and English support. Runs locally.
Powerful reasoning model that shows its thinking. Great for complex problems. Runs locally.
Google\'s efficient open model. Good balance of speed and quality. Runs locally.
Custom endpoint URL (for Ollama or compatible APIs)
Verify your API key and model are working
Connection successful (no API key needed for %1$s).
Authentication failed — check your API key.
Network error — check your internet connection.
Please enter an API key first.
Connection OK but response was slow (%1$dms). Model may be under load.
API key valid but model did not respond. Check model name.
Start Hermes gateway automatically when app opens
Seconds to wait for AI response before timing out (default 120)
Seconds to wait before auto-restarting after crash (default 30)
Automatically restart gateway if it crashes
Maximum crash restart attempts before giving up (default 3)
Play sound on gateway status changes
Gateway is not running. Start the gateway from the control page to see logs.
This will delete all gateway log entries.
This will delete all gateway session records.
Save current LLM settings as a named profile
API key missing — tap to configure your LLM provider
No IM platform configured — tap to set up messaging
Hermes not installed — tap to start installation
Gateway stopped — tap to start it
No system prompt set — tap to add one
Multiple issues found — tap to view
No API key set — tap to configure
Gateway is not running — tap to start
Hermes not installed — tap to install
No IM platform configured — tap to set up
No system prompt — tap to set one
Choose a template to auto-configure your AI assistant. You can always customize settings later.
Expert programmer that writes clean code, explains concepts, and helps debug issues.
Temperature: 0.2 · Max tokens: 4096 · Best for: programming help

You are an expert software engineer. Write clean, efficient, well-documented code. Explain your reasoning clearly. When debugging, identify root causes and suggest fixes. Follow best practices and design patterns appropriate to the language and framework.
Imaginative writer for stories, brainstorming, and creative projects.
Temperature: 0.9 · Max tokens: 2048 · Best for: creative writing

You are a creative and imaginative writer. Think outside the box, offer unique perspectives, and express ideas vividly. Help with stories, poetry, brainstorming, and creative projects. Be expressive and engaging.
Patient tutor that explains concepts clearly and helps with learning.
Temperature: 0.7 · Max tokens: 2048 · Best for: learning and tutoring

You are a patient and encouraging tutor. Explain concepts clearly using simple language and examples. Break down complex topics into understandable parts. Ask follow-up questions to check understanding. Adapt your teaching style to the learner.
Professional email composer for work and personal communication.
Temperature: 0.5 · Max tokens: 1024 · Best for: email and communication
You are a professional email writer. Compose clear, concise, and well-structured emails. Match the appropriate tone (formal, semi-formal, casual) based on context. Keep emails focused and actionable.
Analytical assistant for research, fact-checking, and deep analysis.
Temperature: 0.3 · Max tokens: 4096 · Best for: research and analysis

You are a thorough research assistant. Provide accurate, well-sourced information. Analyze topics from multiple perspectives. Present findings in a structured format. Always note limitations and uncertainties. Be precise and factual.
Choose a pre-configured template for your use case
One-tap setup with Ollama (no API key needed, runs locally)
Tap here to run the setup wizard and get started in minutes.
Ready! You can now start the gateway.
Ollama is already configured! Start the gateway to begin.
Ready to start — all systems configured
Fix %d issue(s) before starting the gateway
Hermes can connect to Telegram so you can chat with your AI assistant directly in Telegram messages.
Comma-separated user IDs (leave empty to allow all)

How to get your bot token:

1. Open Telegram and search for @BotFather
2. Send /newbot to create a new bot
3. Choose a name and username for your bot
4. Copy the bot token provided by BotFather
Verify your bot token is valid by testing the connection.
Bot token is valid! Your Telegram bot is ready.
Invalid bot token — please check and try again.

Next steps:

• Start the Hermes Gateway from Settings
• Send a message to your bot on Telegram
• You can change settings anytime from Hermes Settings
Hermes can connect to Discord so you can chat with your AI assistant in Discord servers and DMs.
Paste your bot token from Discord Developer Portal
Comma-separated Discord user IDs (leave empty to allow all)

How to get your bot token:

1. Go to discord.com/developers/applications
2. Click "New Application" and name it
3. Go to "Bot" section and click "Reset Token"
4. Copy the bot token
5. Enable "Message Content Intent" under Bot > Privileged Gateway Intents
Verify your bot token is valid by testing the connection.
Bot token is valid! Your Discord bot is ready.
Invalid bot token — please check and try again.

Next steps:

• Invite your bot to your Discord server
• Start the Hermes Gateway from Settings
• Send a message to your bot on Discord
• You can change settings anytime from Hermes Settings

Hermes can connect to Feishu or Lark so you can chat with your AI assistant directly in messages.\n\nSimply scan a QR code with your phone — no technical knowledge needed. A bot will be created automatically.

What you'll need:

• A Feishu or Lark account on your phone
• About 1 minute

You'll just scan a QR code and you're done!
Select which platform you use. Feishu is for China, Lark is for international users.
Open Feishu or Lark on your phone and scan the QR code below to create your bot.
Open Feishu / Lark on your phone and scan the QR code below
Please wait for the scan to complete
QR code expired. Please scan again.
Failed to connect to Feishu. Please check your network.
Failed to get QR code. Please try again.
Network error. Please check your connection.
Bot created, but verification failed (safe to continue).

Next steps:

• Start the Hermes Gateway from Settings to begin receiving messages
• Send a message to your bot on Feishu to start chatting
• You can change these settings anytime from Hermes Settings
Hermes web server is not running. Start the gateway to enable the web UI.

Hermes Agent is not installed yet at:
%1$s

Please wait for the auto-install to complete.

Hermes connects AI assistants to your messaging apps. This wizard will help you get started in just a few steps.

You'll need:
• An API key from an AI provider (OpenAI, Anthropic, etc.)
• Optionally, a messaging account (Feishu, Telegram, Discord)
Select your AI provider and enter your API key. This is required for Hermes to work.
You can connect Hermes to Feishu/Lark to chat with your AI assistant directly in messages. This step is optional — you can set it up later from Hermes Settings.
You can skip this step and configure Feishu later from Hermes Settings.
Almost there! Start the Hermes gateway to begin receiving messages from your connected platforms.
Gateway failed to start. You can try again from Settings.
You can skip this step and start the gateway later from Hermes Settings.
Hermes is ready to go. You can start the gateway from the Hermes Settings or use the Web UI tab.\n\nTo change your settings at any time, tap the Hermes icon in the sidebar.
You can connect Hermes to your messaging platforms. This step is optional — you can set it up later from Settings.
Set your API key in LLM config
Choose a model in LLM config
Set up Feishu, Telegram, Discord, or WhatsApp
Add a system prompt or choose a persona
All checks passed! Ready to start.
%d issues must be fixed before starting
No conversations found. Start a chat through your IM platform to see history here.
Gateway not running. Please start the Hermes gateway first.
Authentication failed. Please restart the gateway.
Server error (HTTP %d). Please try again later.
Grant notification permission for gateway service
Balanced — temperature 0.7, 2048 tokens. Good for general chat.
Creative — temperature 0.9, 2048 tokens. Imaginative and expressive.
Precise — temperature 0.2, 4096 tokens. Factual and analytical.
Code — temperature 0.2, 4096 tokens. Expert coding assistant.
Quick setup for common use cases
Free local AI — no API key, runs on device
Multi-provider — access any model via one API
Switched to %s — set your API key below
Pricing not available for this model
Enter the model name to use
Leave empty for default provider URL
Scan QR code to import config
Provider: %1$s / Model: %2$s\nAPI key is not included in QR code for security.
Paste the config string from another device\'s QR export.
Config imported successfully! Remember to set your API key.
Custom system prompt for the AI assistant

You are a professional AI assistant. Be thorough, accurate, and well-organized. Use clear formatting with headers and bullet points. Cite sources when possible. Maintain a formal but approachable tone.

You are a friendly and empathetic AI companion. Be warm, conversational, and supportive. Use casual language and occasional humor. Show genuine interest in helping. Keep responses engaging and easy to read.

You are a creative writing assistant. Be imaginative, expressive, and original. Use vivid language and compelling narratives. Help with brainstorming, storytelling, poetry, and creative problem-solving. Think outside the box.

You are a technical expert assistant. Provide precise, detailed technical answers. Include code examples, diagrams, and step-by-step instructions when relevant. Prioritize accuracy and best practices. Explain complex concepts clearly.

You are a concise assistant. Give brief, direct answers. Avoid unnecessary elaboration. Use bullet points and short sentences. Get straight to the point. Only provide additional detail when specifically asked.

You are a patient language tutor. Help users learn and practice languages. Correct mistakes gently with explanations. Provide examples and exercises. Adapt to the user\'s skill level. Encourage practice and celebrate progress.

You are a professional translator. Provide accurate translations between languages. Explain nuances, idioms, and cultural context. Offer alternative phrasings when appropriate. Maintain the tone and style of the original text.

You are an expert programming assistant. Write clean, efficient, and well-documented code. Explain your approach and reasoning. Suggest best practices and potential improvements. Debug errors systematically with clear explanations.

You are a data analysis expert. Help interpret data, create visualizations, and derive insights. Explain statistical concepts clearly. Provide actionable recommendations based on data. Use precise mathematical language when needed.
Open provider dashboard to get or manage your API key
Ollama runs AI models locally on your device. No API key needed, completely free and private.

1. Open the Termux terminal (Bash tab)
2. Run: curl -fsSL https://ollama.com/install.sh | sh
3. Wait for installation to complete
4. Start Ollama: ollama serve &
5. Pull a model: ollama pull llama3
6. Come back here and select your model

Popular Models:
• llama3 — Best general purpose (4.7GB)
• mistral — Fast and capable (4.1GB)
• codellama — Code generation
• phi3 — Small and fast (2.3GB)
• gemma2 — Google's open model
OpenAI provides GPT-4o, GPT-4o-mini, and other powerful models. You\'ll need an API key from the OpenAI dashboard.

1. Go to platform.openai.com and sign up or log in
2. Navigate to API Keys in Settings
3. Click "Create new secret key"
4. Copy the key (it starts with sk-)
5. Paste it in the API Key field above
6. Select your preferred model (GPT-4o recommended)
Anthropic provides Claude models known for safety and helpfulness. You\'ll need an API key from the Anthropic Console.

1. Go to console.anthropic.com and sign up or log in
2. Navigate to API Keys in Settings
3. Click "Create Key"
4. Copy the key
5. Paste it in the API Key field above
6. Select your preferred model (Claude Sonnet recommended)
Google provides Gemini models with strong multilingual and reasoning capabilities. Get an API key from Google AI Studio.

1. Go to aistudio.google.com and sign in with Google
2. Click "Get API Key" or go to Settings
3. Create or select a project
4. Copy the API key
5. Paste it in the API Key field above
6. Select your preferred model (Gemini 2.5 Pro recommended)
DeepSeek provides cost-effective AI models with strong coding and reasoning capabilities. Popular for budget-conscious users.

1. Go to platform.deepseek.com and sign up
2. Navigate to API Keys
3. Click "Create API Key"
4. Copy the key
5. Paste it in the API Key field above
6. Select your preferred model (DeepSeek-V3 recommended)
OpenRouter gives you access to 100+ models from multiple providers through a single API key. Great for trying different models.

1. Go to openrouter.ai and sign up
2. Navigate to Keys in Settings
3. Click "Create Key"
4. Copy the key
5. Paste it in the API Key field above
6. Select any model — OpenRouter routes to the right provider
xAI provides Grok models with real-time knowledge and a playful personality. Get an API key from the xAI Console.

1. Go to console.x.ai and sign up
2. Navigate to API Keys
3. Create a new API key
4. Copy the key
5. Paste it in the API Key field above
6. Select your preferred model (Grok-3 recommended)
Alibaba Cloud provides Qwen models with strong Chinese and multilingual support through DashScope.

1. Go to dashscope.console.aliyun.com and sign up
2. Enable DashScope service
3. Navigate to API-KEY Management
4. Create a new API key
5. Copy the key
6. Paste it in the API Key field above
7. Select your preferred model (Qwen-Max recommended)
Mistral AI provides efficient open and commercial models. Known for fast inference and competitive pricing.

1. Go to console.mistral.ai and sign up
2. Navigate to API Keys
3. Click "Create new key"
4. Copy the key
5. Paste it in the API Key field above
6. Select your preferred model (Mistral Large recommended)
NVIDIA provides access to popular open-source models through their API platform, optimized on NVIDIA infrastructure.

1. Go to build.nvidia.com and sign up
2. Navigate to your profile to get an API key
3. Copy the key
4. Paste it in the API Key field above
5. Select your preferred model from the catalog
Connect to any OpenAI-compatible API endpoint. Enter your base URL and API key.

1. Set up your OpenAI-compatible API server
2. Enter the Base URL in the Endpoint section
3. Enter your API key
4. Enter your model name
5. Test the connection
Hermes is an AI assistant gateway that connects language models to messaging platforms.
1. Configure your LLM provider and API key\n2. Set up a messaging platform\n3. Start the gateway
Hermes supports Feishu/Lark, Telegram, and Discord.
Check the gateway log for errors. Make sure your API key is valid.
Scan QR code to fill credentials
Please enter a bot token first
No QR scanner app found. Please install one.
Check your internet connection and try again.
Direct connection failed, trying ghfast mirror…
Installing Hermes Agent (this may take 10–30 min)…
This will delete the current installation and download Hermes Agent again. Continue?
Validation failed — installation may be incomplete

Getting Started
Hermes connects AI assistants to messaging platforms.

API Key Issues
Check your API key is correct.

Gateway Troubleshooting
Check gateway log for errors.
Send a test message through the gateway
This will overwrite your current configuration.
You have unsaved changes. Do you want to save them?
No log entries match the filter.
Export all settings to a JSON file
Import settings from a JSON file
This will overwrite your current settings. Continue?
Hermes connects AI assistants to messaging platforms. Let us show you around.
Tap the Gateway tab to start/stop the Hermes gateway service.
Go to the LLM tab to set up your AI provider and API key.
Use the IM tab to connect Feishu, Telegram, or Discord.
Start the gateway and your AI assistant will begin responding.
Suppress non-critical notifications during specified hours
Configure agent behavior, memory, and session management
Auto-compress conversation context to save tokens
Trigger compression when context exceeds this ratio (0.1–0.9)
Maximum context window size in tokens
Seconds of inactivity before gateway times out
Enable detailed agent logging for debugging
Let the agent store personal notes across sessions
Let the agent build a profile of your preferences
When to automatically reset conversation sessions
Reset session after this many minutes of inactivity
Hour of day (0–23) to reset sessions
For Hermes to read messages, you MUST enable these Privileged Gateway Intents in the Discord Developer Portal:
Use this link to invite your bot to a Discord server. Replace YOUR_CLIENT_ID with your Application ID from the Developer Portal.
Configure Model Context Protocol servers for extended tools
Configure WhatsApp Business API for AI assistant
Hermes can connect to WhatsApp Business API so your AI assistant can respond to WhatsApp messages.

How to set up WhatsApp Business API:
1. Go to business.facebook.com and create a Business account 2. Go to WhatsApp Manager and create a phone number 3. Get the Phone Number ID from WhatsApp settings 4. Create a Permanent Access Token in App Dashboard 5. Enter the credentials below
Enter your WhatsApp Phone Number ID
Enter your WhatsApp Business Account ID
Testing connection to WhatsApp Business API…

Next steps:
• Configure webhook URL in Meta Developer Portal • Start the Hermes Gateway • Send a message to your WhatsApp Business number • You can change settings anytime from Hermes Settings
Hermes will connect to WhatsApp Business API so your AI assistant can respond to WhatsApp messages. You\'ll need your Phone Number ID and Access Token from Meta Developer Portal.
Updated to v%1$s. Restart gateway to apply.
Export with masked secrets (safer to share)
Use different models based on task complexity to optimize costs
Model for simple tasks (e.g. gpt-4o-mini, claude-haiku-4-5)
Tasks above this threshold (0.0–1.0) use the primary model
Close browser after N minutes of no activity (default 30)
Custom user agent string for web scraping (leave empty for default)
Run browser in headless mode without visible window
Maximum number of browser tabs the agent can open (default 5)
Choose how voice messages are transcribed
Language for transcription (e.g., en, zh, ja, ko)
Local Whisper model size (larger = more accurate but slower)
Custom OpenAI-compatible endpoint URL for transcription
Maximum messages a single user can send per minute (default 10)
Maximum messages across all users per minute (default 30)
Seconds between messages from the same user (default 5)
What to do when rate limit is exceeded
Minimum log level to record (default INFO)
Write agent logs to a file for later review
Rotate log file when it exceeds this size (default 10MB)
Number of rotated log files to keep (default 5)
Quick Start with Ollama (Free, No API Key)
Hermes Agent is ready to set up. Tap the Hermes icon in the toolbar to configure your AI assistant.\n\nYou can set up anytime — nothing will break if you explore first.
Not configured yet. Run the Setup Wizard to get started.
Partially configured. Some features may not work.
This will restore configuration from the last backup. Current settings will be overwritten. Continue?
This will delete all Hermes configuration (API keys, IM settings, gateway config) and restart the setup wizard. This cannot be undone.
Allow remote SSH connections to this device
Start SSH server when device boots
Default password is \"hermes\" — change it for security
No SSH log entries found.\n\nSSH logs are captured from logcat (tags: sshd, HermesInstaller, GatewayControl).
sshd failed with no output (check logcat for details)
You are running the latest version
This will replace your current configuration with the last backup. Continue?
Allows Hermux to interact with your device UI — click buttons, type text, read screen content — via the Hermes Agent.
